name: Peaches and Spice Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups peaches, drained (or the juice from canned peaches)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together oats and apple juice.
2. Add egg to the oat mixture and stir until combined.
3. In another bowl, combine whole wheat flour, bread flour, milled bran, salt, butter, honey, peaches (or peach juice), cinnamon, ginger, nutmeg, and walnuts.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, stirring until just mixed.
5. Add yeast to the mixture and stir until incorporated.
6. Pour the batter into a greased bread pan.
7. Place in a preheated oven and select light crust setting. Press start.
8. Allow to cool for 1 hour before slicing.
